text:
Created attachment 167044
The poudriere testport log (FreeBSD 10.2 amd64)

(In reply to comment #2)
> But I can't test this configuration on newer FreeBSD version for core dump(s),
> which I see on FreeBSD 10.2, when using GCC, instead of CLANG compiler.

I need to note again, that this port was built and run ok, when using current (3.4.1) default CLANG compiler on FreeBSD 10.2.
Added poudriere testport log for FreeBSD 10.2 amd64, just in case.
